title: T-074 — RM usability validation shared decision service
prompt:
# T-074 — RM usability validation shared decision service

Create `validateRmUsability` as the shared Technical decision used by BOM line add/edit, factory_spec approval, PO actual review and Production material issue. Inputs: org_id, component_item_id, target_fg_item_id or bom_header_id, supplier_code when known, context enum `bom_edit|factory_spec_approval|po_receipt_review|production_issue`. Checks: item status active, supplier approved, active non-expired supplier_spec, allergen compatibility against target FG/BOM, cost_review_blocked false, spec_review_blocked false, and QC/release read-model usable when applicable. Return structured result with `usable:boolean`, check rows, blocking reasons, warning reasons and remediation links. RED first: each failing criterion produces deterministic code.

pipeline_inputs.details: This task must centralize semantics; do not duplicate ad-hoc checks in BOM actions. Supplier approval may be read from supplier_specs.supplier_status in Phase 1 or supplier master if available. Lab/QC status is read-only from Quality-owned read model; absence of required QC status must be a typed warning/block according to context. No UI implementation in this task. Enforcement consumers must call this service at BOM line add/edit, bundle approval, PO receipt review, and Production material issue seams; failing hard-block checks must be machine-readable for UI panels and APIs.
acceptance_criteria: Given item status is blocked, when validateRmUsability runs, then usable=false and reason code ITEM_NOT_ACTIVE is returned.
Given supplier_spec is expired or missing, then reason code SUPPLIER_SPEC_NOT_ACTIVE is returned.
Given RM allergens conflict with target FG allergen constraints, then reason code ALLERGEN_CONFLICT is returned with allergen codes.
Given all checks pass, then usable=true and all check rows are green with source references.
Given context=bom_edit and validateRmUsability returns a blocking reason, then BOM line add/edit service rejects the change with the same code and no line mutation.

Given context=factory_spec_approval and Quality read model says required QC release is missing, then approval is blocked or warned according to configured rule and the response includes QC_RELEASE_MISSING.
Given UI consumers request the report shape, then check rows include label, code, severity, source, remediation_href and evidence timestamp.
test_strategy: Create unit RED table tests for every reason code.
risk_red_lines: Do not own lab workflow in Technical; consume read model only.
Do not silently approve unknown supplier/spec data.
Do not return unstructured strings only; callers need typed codes.
Do not let UI-only warnings replace server-side enforcement for hard blocks.
pipeline_inputs.description: Shared RM usability decision service and server-side enforcement contract.
